signal.title: AppOmni expands AWS co-sell agreement
signal.summary: AppOmni announced an expanded co-sell agreement with AWS targeting enterprise SaaS security buyers. The deal includes joint field events and a presence in AWS Marketplace.
signal.why_it_matters: This strengthens AppOmni's distribution into AWS-centric enterprise accounts — our primary ICP. It reduces Obsidian's window for displacing AppOmni in cloud-first deals.

actions.description: Coordinate with Optiv and GuidePoint on AWS-native account targeting. Position Obsidian's runtime identity detection as complementary to AppOmni's posture visibility.
actions.outreach_draft: Hey [Partner] — AppOmni just deepened their AWS co-sell. Want to jump on a quick call to align on how we position Obsidian in your AWS-focused accounts? Happy to bring the AE team.

summary_narrative: Ecosystem Radar scanned 1 pages and surfaced 1 new signals, with 1 prioritized for action. 1 high-priority signal(s) from AppOmni require near-term partner response. Recommended actions are included below with suggested owners and outreach drafts.
